transcript.text: A few days off next week.
Do you have any fun plans or?
No, just friends and family hanging out.
Probably going to do some, take my attempt at baking, do some desserts since I'm not really cooking anything for Christmas.
Yeah, my family's coming from Germany, so I'm going to host them and we'll see.
I think my mom's just going to cook.
Are we waiting for anyone else from your side or?
Nope, not for mine, just me.
So, my question is, you guys got the training on HubSpot from Sarah, right?
So my question is, because what's the next step?
I think like when I spoke to Ada last time, she said that you were going to go in and like interlink in between and stuff in the blogs and stuff.
That was actually a question I had as well.
I wasn't sure if she had completed that yet or not.
So I pinged her, but I haven't heard back yet.
And then in terms of the workflow, how is that new workflow going for you guys in Monday?
We had Gabby, who's the new managing editor, had a question just if we need to submit the product approver or requires product review or if Amanda was going to handle that.
If it's a risk advisory blog, then it goes to Nathan.
If it's a financial audit or tax blog, it goes to Brian.
All right, so risk advisory to Nathan.
And then if it's none of the two, just tag Nathan because he's the most responsive.
And who was the person for financial audit and tax?
Just sitting up to her so she has it.
And so I am wondering, so once we approve the blogs, do you guys get a ping?
It might be able to ping Gabby.
I was wondering if we should just ping Gabby once it gets approved.
Because if I go in here right now, there's three of the new blogs have been approved.
So maybe I should just go in here and ping Gabby.
And maybe you can let her know as well.
Yeah, that was a question because I was looking at our air table and I was like, it looks like 15 were in review.
So let me see one sec.
Let me just tag her here.
So, and then if I go up, I see like, okay, one second.
I see one, two, three, four, five, six, seven.
Anyway, so I see like one, two, three, four, five new blogs.
Okay, you just should have been submitted yesterday.
Yeah, we just need to add the product approver in here.
So like, if Gabby can go back and add like Nathan or Brian, that would be good.
And then, oh, one last thing.
For the approved blogs where I just tagged Gabby, these can be uploaded into HubSpot now.
So could you then, could you ask Gabby to just send a ping in Slack, letting us know that they've been posted?
And then I feel like that's all.
I don't have anything else to talk about.
Sorry, was just sending that to her.
So, yeah, I guess from my end, that covers most of what I had on kind of just updates, confirming interlinking happened.
If not, we'll go back and do that.
We've got five more articles that will be submitted next week.
We don't expect a quick turnaround on those, given it's the holiday week.
Yeah, so we have like a five-day SLA with a team.
So let me just see when I ping them to just see what's like.
So they have until end of week.
Yeah, so for, we'll probably submit five new articles next week, and then we'll put like a, I don't know, traditional seven-day, or should we go to like 10-day SLA on that one?
No, just do the normal SLAs.
And then the week of the 29th, New Year's week, is a quiet week for GrowthX as a company.
And so we won't be meeting that week, but for next week, yeah, so on, what's it, the 31st, New Year's Eve, we won't be meeting that week.
But I did want to see if you want to move this meeting next week to Tuesday.
So I'm going to be out of office Tuesday and Wednesday, so we can also just skip the meeting if you want to.
If there's anything that you need from my end, just like ping me on Slack.
And if there's anything like urgently, I can help.
So that's everything I had on my end.
Um, just wanted to make sure we were tracking the same amount of articles that you guys had in review.
It sounds like we're good to go there.
So I'll just confirm the interlinking is going to happen on our end and keep you posted on that.
I will let Gabby know to go and add those reviewers, um, to the new requests.
And then once we have the.
Three blog posts that have been approved, published, we will ping you to let you know.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Clarify the blog review workflow and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/RVrdbhNjyFLiCyke-8YVs9xXMzWxNmCk?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Product Approvers:** New Monday.com workflow requires adding a product approver (Nathan/Brian) to each blog task to unblock reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/RVrdbhNjyFLiCyke-8YVs9xXMzWxNmCk?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [**Approved Blogs:** 3 blogs are approved and ready for HubSpot publication; GrowthX will notify Fieldguide via Slack upon completion.](https://fathom.video/share/RVrdbhNjyFLiCyke-8YVs9xXMzWxNmCk?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [**Interlinking:** Erik will confirm if Ada completed the required HubSpot interlinking and will follow up if not.](https://fathom.video/share/RVrdbhNjyFLiCyke-8YVs9xXMzWxNmCk?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [**Meeting Schedule:** The weekly sync is canceled for the next two weeks (Dec 24 & 31) due to holidays.](https://fathom.video/share/RVrdbhNjyFLiCyke-8YVs9xXMzWxNmCk?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)

## Topics

### Monday.com Workflow & Approvers

  - [The new Monday.com workflow requires adding a product approver to each blog task to unblock reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/RVrdbhNjyFLiCyke-8YVs9xXMzWxNmCk?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [**Product Approver Assignments:**](https://fathom.video/share/RVrdbhNjyFLiCyke-8YVs9xXMzWxNmCk?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
      - [**Nathan:** Risk Advisory blogs & all other categories.](https://fathom.video/share/RVrdbhNjyFLiCyke-8YVs9xXMzWxNmCk?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
      - [**Brian:** Financial Audit & Tax blogs.](https://fathom.video/share/RVrdbhNjyFLiCyke-8YVs9xXMzWxNmCk?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Nathan is the default for "other" categories because he is the most responsive approver.](https://fathom.video/share/RVrdbhNjyFLiCyke-8YVs9xXMzWxNmCk?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [**Action:** Gabby (Managing Editor) will update the 5 most recent blog tasks with the correct approvers.](https://fathom.video/share/RVrdbhNjyFLiCyke-8YVs9xXMzWxNmCk?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)

### Blog Status & Interlinking

  - [**Approved:** 3 blogs are approved and ready for HubSpot publication.](https://fathom.video/share/RVrdbhNjyFLiCyke-8YVs9xXMzWxNmCk?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [**In Review:** 7 blogs are currently in review, with a 5-day SLA ending this week.](https://fathom.video/share/RVrdbhNjyFLiCyke-8YVs9xXMzWxNmCk?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [**Interlinking:** Erik will confirm with Ada if the required HubSpot interlinking has been completed.](https://fathom.video/share/RVrdbhNjyFLiCyke-8YVs9xXMzWxNmCk?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [**Action:** GrowthX will notify Fieldguide via Slack once the 3 approved blogs are live.](https://fathom.video/share/RVrdbhNjyFLiCyke-8YVs9xXMzWxNmCk?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)

### Upcoming Schedule

  - [**New Submissions:** 5 new articles will be submitted next week, using the standard 5-day SLA.](https://fathom.video/share/RVrdbhNjyFLiCyke-8YVs9xXMzWxNmCk?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [**Meeting Cancellations:**](https://fathom.video/share/RVrdbhNjyFLiCyke-8YVs9xXMzWxNmCk?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
      - [**Dec 24:** Canceled (Yasine OOO).](https://fathom.video/share/RVrdbhNjyFLiCyke-8YVs9xXMzWxNmCk?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)
      - [**Dec 31:** Canceled (GrowthX OOO).](https://fathom.video/share/RVrdbhNjyFLiCyke-8YVs9xXMzWxNmCk?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
  - [**Communication:** For urgent needs during the break, use Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/RVrdbhNjyFLiCyke-8YVs9xXMzWxNmCk?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Erik:**](https://fathom.video/share/RVrdbhNjyFLiCyke-8YVs9xXMzWxNmCk?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
      - [Confirm with Ada if HubSpot interlinking is complete.](https://fathom.video/share/RVrdbhNjyFLiCyke-8YVs9xXMzWxNmCk?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [Instruct Gabby to add product approvers to the 5 most recent blog tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/RVrdbhNjyFLiCyke-8YVs9xXMzWxNmCk?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
      - [Ensure GrowthX notifies Fieldguide via Slack after publishing the 3 approved blogs.](https://fathom.video/share/RVrdbhNjyFLiCyke-8YVs9xXMzWxNmCk?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [**Gabby (GrowthX):**](https://fathom.video/share/RVrdbhNjyFLiCyke-8YVs9xXMzWxNmCk?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
      - [Add product approvers (Nathan/Brian) to the 5 most recent blog tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/RVrdbhNjyFLiCyke-8YVs9xXMzWxNmCk?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
      - [Publish the 3 approved blogs in HubSpot.](https://fathom.video/share/RVrdbhNjyFLiCyke-8YVs9xXMzWxNmCk?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)

action_items.description: Add product approvers in Monday for 5 new blogs: Nathan (risk advisory/other), Brian (audit/tax)
Publish 3 approved blogs in HubSpot; ping Yasine in Slack when live
Submit 5 new articles next week; use standard SLAs
